text: No baseline data for hourly sync frequency — cadence is aesthetic, not empirical
validate-registry.sh duplicates generator's collection logic (systemctl, health, Munin plumbing) — third copy of same pattern
Cross-host problem is design requirement, not implementation detail — mimir on Pi 2 can't be checked locally
Adding 4+ systemd units to fix maintenance doesn't reduce complexity, just relocates it
Detect+report without act is observability increment, not autonomous operations
Skuld integration is speculative — no proven consumer contract for validation results
Job-scoped git pull conflicts with security scan's read-only hardening (ProtectSystem=strict, ReadOnlyPaths)
registry.js discards host metadata — QUERY=systemd and QUERY=ports return names without hosts, so collector is structurally host-blind
Adding pull-before-run to generator changes it from idempotent doc tool to state-mutating maintenance command
